mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_review ( REVIEW_ID, PRODUCT_ID, MEMBERNO, ORDER_ITEM_ID, RATING, REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_IMG, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_MARKET_REVIEW.NEXTVAL, #{product_id}, #{memberno}, #{order_item_id}, #{rating}, #{review_content}, #{review_img, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT r.REVIEW_ID, r.PRODUCT_ID, r.MEMBERNO, r.ORDER_ITEM_ID, r.RATING, r.REVIEW_CONTENT, r.REVIEW_IMG, r.REG_DATE, m.MNAME, m.ID
FROM market_review r
INNER JOIN member m ON r.MEMBERNO = m.MEMBERNO
WHERE r.PRODUCT_ID = #{value}
ORDER BY r.REVIEW_ID DESC

SELECT r.REVIEW_ID, r.PRODUCT_ID, r.MEMBERNO, r.RATING, r.REVIEW_CONTENT, r.REVIEW_IMG, r.REG_DATE, p.PRODUCT_NAME
FROM market_review r
INNER JOIN market p ON r.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID
WHERE r.MEMBERNO = #{value}
ORDER BY r.REVIEW_ID DESC
